drug: Use fresh Group O Rhesus negative blood for urgent transfusion
Transfusion recommended when PCV is < 36% and infant is critically ill
Transfusion recommended when PCV is < 30% and infant is stable or surgery is urgently needed
Single volume exchange blood transfusion with 80mL/kg of fresh cross-matched blood for severe anaemia within the first week
Intravenous frusemide 1 mg/kg to manage circulatory overload
supportive_measures: Decision to transfuse should be based on the infant's haemodynamics – pulse, blood pressure
Slow drip rate to manage circulatory overload

complications: Transfusion reactions are extremely rare in the newborn
Risk of transmission of infections such as HIV, Hepatitis B Virus, Hepatitis C Virus, CMV
